summary: The system follows a modular architecture but has critical security flaws in the container configuration.

findings.title: Untrusted Binary Source in Dockerfile
findings.description: The Dockerfile downloads binaries from an unvetted third-party URL using curl without checksum verification.
findings.impact: Potential for Remote Code Execution (RCE) via Man-in-the-Middle attack on the binary provider.
findings.recommendation: Use official base images and verify binary checksums before execution.

findings.title: Circular Dependency in API Layer
findings.description: The AuthService and UserService reference each other directly, leading to tight coupling.
findings.impact: Difficult to test and maintain; potential for stack overflow on complex instantiations.
findings.recommendation: Introduce an interface or an event-driven mechanism to decouple these services.
